title: Manager – Compliance Relationship
metaDescription: Manager – Compliance Relationship role in Singapore: manage client compliance relationships, oversee AML/KYC, and advise on regulatory obligations.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for a Compliance Relationship Manager to join our Compliance team in Singapore.
duties: Manage a portfolio of clients and serve as the primary compliance point of contact.
Oversee AML/KYC and ongoing due diligence for client relationships.
Advise clients on regulatory obligations and compliance best practices.
Monitor and escalate compliance risks and ensure timely remediation.
Lead and review the work of the compliance team.
requirements: Degree in Law, Finance, Business, or a related field.
5+ years of compliance experience in financial or professional services.
Excellent client management and communication skills.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
